hero.mockupAIText: Your metrics are normal. I recommend increasing water intake to 2.1 liters.

features.subtitle: Full control over your health in one app.
features.f1Desc: One smart indicator — see how you're doing now and compare with last week.
features.f2Desc: "You're 32, but your health is 29" — powerful psychological trigger. Shared on social media.
features.f3Desc: Allergies, chronic conditions, history, medications, vaccinations — everything in one place.
features.f4Desc: Take it once a month — updates your Health Score. Brings you back to the app.
features.f5Desc: Chat with AI: symptoms, advice, referral to doctor. No diagnoses.
features.f6Desc: Steps, water, sleep, nutrition — simple daily habits with AI suggestions.
features.f7Desc: One tap → PDF with full medical history. Show the doctor from screen or print.

personas.subtitle: Three usage scenarios that cover 80% of real needs.
personas.p1Subtitle: I want to understand my body
personas.p1Quote: I don't get sick, but I get tired. I want to understand where everything is OK and where I need to pay attention — without clinic visits.
personas.p2Quote: Mom has high blood pressure, the child needs vaccinations, grandma has diabetes. I want to see the whole family on one screen.
personas.p3Subtitle: I have a chronic condition — I need a system
personas.p3Quote: I have hypertension, I want to monitor blood pressure, medications and always have my data when I go to the doctor.

stats.subtitle: This is part of the big MedSoft platform. In 3 months we'll launch doctor appointments directly from the app.

cta.subtitle: Open the app right now — free, no App Store registration, in 30 seconds.

faq.subtitle: If you didn't find an answer — write to us on Telegram, we'll respond in a couple of hours.
faq.q1: Is it really free? What's the catch?
faq.a1: Completely free for all MVP features. We're building an ecosystem — the app is the first step. In the future some advanced features may be paid, but the basic Health Score, AI chat and tracking will always remain free.
faq.q2: Where is my medical data stored?
faq.a2: On servers in Uzbekistan. End-to-end encryption, only you have access. We comply with the Uzbekistan Law on Personal Data Protection and GDPR.
faq.a3: No. AI helps understand symptoms, gives general recommendations and directs to the right specialist. Making diagnoses is the doctor's job.
faq.q4: Do I need to download from the App Store?
faq.a4: No. This is a PWA (Progressive Web App) — it opens in a browser but installs as a regular app on the home screen. iOS, Android and desktop — it works the same everywhere.
faq.q5: Can it be used in the Uzbek language?
faq.a5: Yes. 3 languages are supported: Russian, Uzbek, English. The AI assistant also understands all three languages.
faq.q6: What is MedSoft and what does aivita have to do with it?
faq.a6: MedSoft is a large platform for Uzbekistan's healthcare. aivita is the first application in the ecosystem that launches before the others.
faq.q7: When will doctor appointment booking launch through the app?
faq.a7: We plan to launch in 3-4 months. If you've enabled notifications in settings — you'll be the first to know.
